TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kungadavane, title = Kungadavane, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kungadavane} }

S.FORM: alang Kungadavane ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Mawring Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 186 buwan, 614 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 592 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 87%, Paywan 6%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kungadavane hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kungadavane hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kungadavane hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kungadavane hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kungadavane hya' ga 'Oponoho. giway rgrgyax qu qalang. talagay cingy lluhi nya' qalang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san sraral hiya' mga, ungat qu glgan ru hmkani' na kakay musa' ana inu' qu ita' tayal ma. basu kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kungadavane ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Mawring Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 186 buwan, 614 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 592 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 87%, Paywan 6%, Bunun 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kungadavane hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kungadavane hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kungadavane hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Kungadavane hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kungadavane hya' ga 'Oponoho. giway rgrgyax qu qalang. talagay cingy lluhi nya' qalang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san sraral hiya' mga, ungat qu glgan ru hmkani' na kakay musa' ana inu' qu ita' tayal ma. basu kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kuŋa*a*ane ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu mawriŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kuŋa*a*ane ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kuŋa*a*ane ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kuŋa*a*ane ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na kuŋa*a*ane ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na kuŋa*a*ane ħjaʔ ɣa ʔoponoħo. ɣiwaj rɣrɣjax qu qalaŋ. talaɣaj ʦ~ʨiŋj lluħi njaʔ qalaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan s~ɕraral ħijaʔ mɣa, uŋat qu ɣlɣan ru ħmkaniʔ na kakaj mus~ɕaʔ ana inuʔ qu itaʔ tajal ma. βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan uŋat kis~ɕjaʔ njaʔ. s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
